text:
# Carcavelos Daily Brief – Friday, May 1st

**Tiny but clean – early light is your golden ticket today.**

**Morning (03:45–11:00):** Consistent 1.4m waves with 11–12 second NW swell. Light winds under 5km/h make this the premium window. Get in the water by first light (03:45) through 09:00 for glassy conditions. By 10:00, SW wind kicks in gently but starts working the surface.

**Progression:** Swell holds steady at 1.3–1.4m all day, but afternoon westerly winds pick up to 12km/h by 15:00, choppying things up. Wave quality degrades noticeably after midday.

**Afternoon (12:00–18:00):** Still rideable but messy. Wind-driven texture dominates; only worth it if you can't get morning.

**Tips:** Bring a shortboard – small, clean waves reward quick reflexes. Sunrise crew beats any crowd today. Skip the afternoon unless conditions surprise you – they won't.
